data.description: Phase 1b: Gather graphics/illustrations/textures Julianna loves. Compile moodboard. Research AI graphics platforms (Midjourney, Codex, Gemini, DALL-E) for generating assets in the Asimov aesthetic. Test each platform, establish repeatable workflow. Deliverable: research/03-ai-graphics-pipeline.md + initial generated assets.
data.title: Visual inspiration gathering & AI graphics pipeline

data.body: Retroactive completion: research/03-graphics-pipeline-final.md (66KB) shipped with asset-workflows/ directory (6 runnable scripts + prompt templates). PR #5 merged, commit 9eec9d3. Deliverable covers design DNA, computational tools, AI platforms, and recommended hybrid pipeline. Transparency support identified as first-class requirement.

Retroactive close: all Phase 1b deliverables shipped and merged (PR #5). research/03-graphics-pipeline-final.md is comprehensive (66KB) covering design DNA, computational tools, AI platforms, and recommended hybrid pipeline. asset-workflows/ contains 6 runnable scripts and prompt templates. Already referenced as primary visual/graphics decision guide in CLAUDE.md.
